THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VELEZ, CARMEN AKA CARMEN D. VELEZ AKA CARMEN F. VELEZ AKA CARMEN FRANCISCO VELEZ        AKA CARMEN FRANCISCO-BELAIR A VERDICT HAVING BEEN REACHED BY TWELVE JURORS IN THE ABOVE ACTION ON FEB 20, 2002 IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF ROSENDO S. CARMEN VELEZ THE RESTITUTION OF 907 CORTLAND AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA.
